gettingStarted.title: Creating your account
gettingStarted.content: Create an account with a strong password and write your recovery phrase on paper before continuing.

gettingStarted.title: First transaction
gettingStarted.content: Send a small test amount first, verify recipient details, and confirm settlement in activity history.

gettingStarted.title: Backing up wallet
gettingStarted.content: Keep two offline recovery phrase backups in separate secure places and never share them online.

features.title: Sending payments
features.content: Use the Send flow to enter recipient, amount, and network details, then review and sign.

features.title: Receiving payments
features.content: Use the Receive screen to copy your address or share a QR code with the sender.

features.title: Session keys
features.content: Create scoped, time-limited session keys for safer repeated operations and revoke keys when done.

security.title: Best practices
security.content: Use unique credentials, keep devices updated, and verify all transaction details before signing.

security.title: Troubleshooting
security.content: Check network selection, balances, and error messages first; then recreate issue with minimal steps.

faq.question: Can support recover my wallet?
faq.answer: No. Only your recovery phrase can restore wallet access.

faq.question: Why is my payment pending?
faq.answer: Network congestion or confirmation delays can cause temporary pending status.

faq.question: When should I revoke session keys?
faq.answer: Revoke keys as soon as a workflow is complete or any suspicious behavior appears.

tooltips.send: Double-check recipient address and network before confirming a payment.
tooltips.receive: Share your public address or QR code only; never share private keys.
tooltips.sessionKeys: Session keys should have least privilege and short expirations.
tooltips.security: Protect your recovery phrase offline and review permissions often.
